# mxroute_reseller_packages (Data Source)

Lists reseller package names on the MXroute account. Requires a reseller account. For one package's settings, use the `mxroute_reseller_package` resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mxroute_reseller_packages" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier — a fixed value for this account-wide list.
- `names` (List of String) The names of all reseller packages.
